items.title: Who is making decisions in Iran?
items.dek: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.
items.body: Iran's new supreme leader is supposed to have the final say, but in practice the picture is far murkier.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israeli police investigate after officers 'cut Palestinian flag' from skullcap
items.dek: The British Israeli man says he was detained after someone took offence at his kippah embroidered with Israeli and Palestinian flags.
items.body: The British Israeli man says he was detained after someone took offence at his kippah embroidered with Israeli and Palestinian flags.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mandelson under formal investigation by EU's anti-fraud office
items.dek: The EU's anti-fraud office confirms it has "sufficient information" to launch an investigation, but does not say if it involves fraud.
items.body: The EU's anti-fraud office confirms it has "sufficient information" to launch an investigation, but does not say if it involves fraud.
items.author: IriLine Desk
